transcript_review: editable transcript review after STT success
explicit re-record, edit, send, and text fallback controls
typed composer input preserved before voice confirmation
visible warning for transcripts over 2000 characters
implementation.chat_boundary: confirmed transcript uses the existing sendMessage and /api/chat path exactly once
response_playback: assistant text renders before optional TTS
synthesize is requested only after chat success
playback stop and object URL revoke are handled
TTS errors preserve the assistant text fallback
implementation.lifecycle: reset invalidates stale transcription callbacks and clears voice review state

validation.command: node --check static/app.js && node --check static/voice.js && node --check scripts/gui-smoke/voice-local-smoke.mjs

scenarios: overlong transcript warning and explicit confirmation

adversarial_classes.malformed_input: covered by overlong transcript and empty-review handling
adversarial_classes.stale_state: covered by reset during delayed transcription
adversarial_classes.dirty_worktree: covered; unrelated tracked and untracked paths preserved
adversarial_classes.hung_timeout: covered by bounded browser smoke invocation
adversarial_classes.misleading_success_output: covered by direct DOM and request-count assertions
adversarial_classes.repeated_interruptions: covered by playback stop and reset cleanup
adversarial_classes.cancel_resume: not_applicable; no resumable voice job state

cleanup.raw_audio: no raw audio or provider payload persisted
cleanup.network: smoke uses local HTTP server and fake API routes only
cleanup.redacted_ledger_entry: T7 confirmed: transcript review, canonical chat confirmation, optional TTS playback, and stale-state cleanup verified
